creator: squat@squat.no
text:
Why is net/tftp-hpa included in the ports tree when we have ftp/tftp-hpa?
For me they seem to be mostly the same, even the distinfo, where main difference is the comments and descriptions?
I'd guess this two ports should somewhat be merged - and not duplicated, as they for me seems to be?

I'm sorry if this isn't the proper way to comment this, feel free to forward my request to where it would belong if so.

--
Tor Halvard Furulund
